CAN_ABS_PRESENT.comment: ABS frame status, indicates if ABS ECU is present or not. Set to 0 after 3 consecutives frames loss

DRIVER_DOOR_FAIL_COUNTER_S.comment: The ECU Shall reset to 0, the counter of missions for driver door switch failure detection, if driver door closing is detected.

DRIVER_DOOR_SW_FAIL_MAX_TP.comment: The ECU shall set the driver door failure state CAN signal to Driver door information Ok when the counter becomes lower than the maximum number of missions to detect driver door switc

DRIVER_DOOR_SW_FAILURE_STATE.comment: After a reset the ECU shall set the driver door switch failure state to failure detected when the counter reaches the maximum number of missions to detect driver door switch failure.

DRIVER_DOOR_SW_MONITORED.comment: The driver door switch is not monitored by default

lists.7: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High
lists.6: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
lists.3: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
lists.2: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Performance
lists.4: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High

lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding/ General Failure Information
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure

lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

ESCL_SAFETY_LINE_PRESENT_CF.comment: configuration to deactive or not the safety line (=0:safety line is always released)

MEMORIZING_ENGINE_STOP_TM_TP.comment: calibration for memorizing a stop request with speed

R_L3_OFF_BY_ENGINE.comment: L3 cut off request by ENGINE function

R_START_ENGINE.comment: Starter request by Feature Activation Logic function
